'''''Star Wars: Imperial Ace''''' is a video game published by [[THQ]] Wireless that was released across Europe exclusively for cellphones in [[2006]]. The game was pre-installed on BenQ Siemens EF81 phones.

''Star Wars: Imperial Ace'' is a 3-dimensional game in which players assume the role of an elite [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] sometime after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] has deployed a fleet of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] to counter a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] uprising on [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]], and every [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] in the armada is at the player's disposal, from [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|bombers]] to [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|interceptors]].

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=IMPERIAL ACE
|text=The Galactic Empire
recently discovered a
strong Rebel presence
on the remote planet
of Mygeeto.
Lord Vader has given
orders to send an
invasion fleet of
Imperial Star
Destroyers.

As Lord Vader expects
an operation without
complications, all elite
pilots of the Imperial
Navy are summoned.
The Imperial armada
has already reached
Mygeeto's orbit and
the invasion will begin
shortly...}}
